items.title: ‘Bots have now passed human traffic online,’ Cloudflare boss laments — says agentic traffic wasn’t expected to eclipse real people until next year
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Hezbollah rejects renewed ceasefire agreed by Israel and Lebanon
items.dek: The United States announced the ceasefire agreement on Wednesday night following a fresh round of talks.
items.body: The United States announced the ceasefire agreement on Wednesday night following a fresh round of talks.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Trump hits back at 'unpatriotic' vote after House rebukes him over Iran
items.dek: The lower chamber of Congress passed a measure that seeks to halt further military action, in a vote seen as largely symbolic.
items.body: The lower chamber of Congress passed a measure that seeks to halt further military action, in a vote seen as largely symbolic.
items.author: IriLine Desk
